creator: acardenas@bsd-peru.org
text:
Hi Dmitry :)

A new version of freepascal will be released soon, i'll begin to work
on bsd.fpc.mk file, i hope it is finish before of fpc-2.2.2 release.

the amd64 version of freepascal on FreeBSD doesn't work yet.

I'm thinking use fpcmake binary that i'm using to build fpc compiler
from source code. It could be used for all fpc ports that needs it.

I'll have news soon :)

Greetings
ACM
